    def eligible_for_rental_assistance(self) -> bool:
        # Define eligibility criteria
        rent_burden_threshold = 0.3  # Rent should be more than 30% of monthly income
        monthly_income = self.annual_income / 12
        rent_burden = self.monthly_rent / monthly_income
        
        # Check if rent burden exceeds threshold
        if rent_burden > rent_burden_threshold:
            return True
        return False
